title: hieracium penninicola
intro: Hieracium penninicola, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Hieracium penninicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in salves and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin care.
